backend.auth: OAuth2 password/PKCE + JWT access with refresh tokens

database.notes: Prefer UUID v4 primary keys; use timestamptz; JSONB for metadata

mobile.privacy: Proofs stored locally by default; hashes only; explicit consent for uploads
mobile.dnd_integration: Use native APIs to toggle/guide DND during floor phase where permitted

services.name: AuthService
services.notes: Short-lived access tokens (15m), refresh (14d), rotate on use

services.name: HabitService
services.notes: Validate durations, cadence presets, enforce unique names per user optional

services.name: SessionService
services.notes: Implements SessionStateMachine with DND hooks via mobile clients; idle_timeout_sec=300

services.name: TokenRewardsService
services.notes: Implements predictable thresholds; optional quiet accrual without spam

services.name: EMAFloorService
responsibilities: Nightly batch computes EMA-based floor adjustments
services.notes: Runs as scheduled job/cron; emits audit trail

services.name: RetentionCleanupJob
services.notes: Runs hourly via scheduler; deletes proofs where now() > expires_at

services.name: SyncService
services.notes: Uses Redis SETNX idempotency key session:{session_id}:{event_type} with TTL

services.name: NudgingService
services.notes: Disabled during quiet hours by policy

services.name: PrivacyManager
services.notes: Proof assets not uploaded unless consent; store only metadata/hashes if ever needed

folder_scaffold.purpose: Domain services (Auth, Session, Habit, EMA, Rewards, Sync)
Auth, rate limits, request validation, metrics

docker_compose: postgres:15 with init SQL and healthcheck
local_dev.migrations: npm run typeorm migration:run on container start

cloud.compute: ECS Fargate service (1-3 tasks, autoscaling by CPU/RPS)
cloud.db: Amazon RDS PostgreSQL (db.t3.medium dev → t4g.medium prod)
cloud.networking: VPC with 2 AZs, ALB, private subnets for RDS/Redis
cloud.secrets: AWS SSM Parameter Store for config, KMS encryption
cloud.scheduler: EventBridge rule @midnight UTC to trigger EMA job (Fargate task) and hourly retention cleanup
cloud.logging: CloudWatch Logs, retention 30-90 days; structured JSON
cloud.ci_cd: GitHub Actions → ECR build/push → ECS deploy
cloud.monitoring: Health checks, synthetic ping of /healthz, KPIs for start latency, restart latency, salvage <5%
cloud.security: JWT validation at edge optional (Lambda@Edge) not required; strict CORS; WAF rate limits

db_tables.name: users
user_settings
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_settings (
  user_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  privacy JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"default_deny":true}',
  quiet_hours JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"start":"22:00","end":"07:00"}',
  max_active_habits SMALLINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

db_tables.name: user_keys
devices
habits
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS habits (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  cadence JSONB NOT NULL,
  floor_sec INT NOT NULL CHECK (floor_sec > 0),
  target_sec INT NOT NULL CHECK (target_sec >= floor_sec),
  stretch_sec INT CHECK (stretch_sec >= target_sec),
  proof_mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'self_attest',
  active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(user_id, name)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_habits_user ON habits(user_id);

db_tables.name: sessions
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  habit_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES habits(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  device_id UUID REFERENCES devices(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  state TEXT NOT NULL,
  has_concurrency BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  floor_reached_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  server_created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  server_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_user ON sessions(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_habit ON sessions(habit_id);

db_tables.name: session_events
token_buckets
token_ledger
floor_history
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS floor_history (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  habit_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES habits(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  previous_floor_sec INT NOT NULL,
  new_floor_sec INT NOT NULL,
  ema_snapshot JSONB NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT NOT NULL,
  effective_date DATE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_floor_history_habit ON floor_history(habit_id);

db_tables.name: proofs
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proofs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  proof_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  consent_scope TEXT NOT NULL,
  stored_locally BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  metadata JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_proofs_session ON proofs(session_id);

api_routes.summary: Exchange refresh token for new access token
api_routes.auth: Refresh token in HTTP-only cookie or body

api_routes.summary: Mark floor reached and award token
Batch upload offline events and receive per-event results

patch_ready_files.summary: Node.js project manifest with scripts (build, dev, test, lint) and deps (express, typeorm, pg, zod, jsonwebtoken, bcrypt, bullmq)
TypeScript config targeting ES2022, strict true, path aliases for src/*
Express app bootstrap, JSON middleware, healthz route, mounts /api/v1 routers
Loads environment variables with defaults and zod validation (PORT, DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, JWT secrets)
TypeORM DataSource setup with Postgres, snake_case naming, migrations path
JWT Bearer validation, attach user to req, handles refresh token cookie parsing
Basic request timing and KPI hooks for start/restart latency
Express Router implementing POST /habits, GET /habits, PATCH /habits/:id with request validation
Express Router implementing /sessions/start, /:id/floor_reached, /:id/complete, /:id/heartbeat, GET /:id
Express Router for POST /sync/batch idempotent ingest
Express Router for POST /auth/refresh
Pure functions handling state transitions and invariants; timestamps sourced server-side
Nightly EMA computation job; applies bounds (<=80% target), cooldowns, writes floor_history
Deletes expired proofs and other short-retention records
Awards deterministic tokens at floor, updates token_buckets, writes token_ledger
Batch apply client events with idempotency and conflict results
SQL migration creating users, user_settings, user_keys, devices, habits, sessions, session_events, token_buckets, token_ledger, floor_history, proofs
Services: postgres, redis, backend; healthchecks; volumes; environment
Terraform skeleton with AWS provider, VPC module references, ECS cluster, RDS and ElastiCache placeholders
SwiftUI app plan: onboarding, Timer screen, offline queue, DND guidance
Kotlin app plan mirroring iOS with WorkManager for sync
Human-readable summary of API routes and schemas
Project overview, how to run locally, environment variables, and architecture summary
CI pipeline: install, lint, build, test, docker build; on push PR
E2E: onboarding to first trial session awards 1 token and completes

constraints_coverage.notes: PrivacyManager, proofs default local-only; consent gates
Nudging disabled by default outside heat window and during quiet hours
Quiet hours in user_settings; NudgingService blocks; DND guidance on clients
No nudges during quiet hours; sessions flagged for salvage policies if started in quiet window
Enforced in HabitService with transactional checks
Mobile offline-first; proofs stored locally; server only stores hashes/metadata if consent
floor_history audit supports reversal; UI/API for weekly review to be added
No commerce in rewards; policy documented
PrivacyManager enforces consent_scope; clients default deny
Monitoring KPI in IaC + Nudging/sleep protections; requires ops tracking

features_coverage.notes: Server timestamps canonical; DND handled on clients
Quiet hours default 22:00-07:00; nudges blocked; DND guidance
Proofs local by default; retention <=72h with cleanup
Idempotency via client_event_id + Redis keys; conflict results returned
Heat window 0.2-0.7; respects quiet hours, DND, calendar
Concurrent sessions accepted and flagged via sessions.has_concurrency; warning surfaced
